zh.lifeSummary: Lord of Beachly and Llanllowel Bleddyn Broadspear ap Morgan是Morgan ab Owain的兒子，於1140年出生在威爾士蒙姆爾武斯可。他至少有1個女兒。他去世於1256年在威爾士享年116歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Lord of Beachly and Llanllowel Bleddyn Broadspear ap Morgan是Morgan ab Owain的儿子，于1140年出生在威尔士蒙姆爾武斯可。他至少有1个女儿。他去世于1256年在威尔士享年116岁。

nameMeanings.name: Morgan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh (especially Glamorgan): from the medieval Welsh personal name Morgan, Morgant (Old Welsh Morcant, of uncertain etymology).
Irish: importation of the Welsh surname (see 1 above), to which has been assimilated more than one Gaelic surname, notably Ó Muireagáin (see Merrigan ).
Scottish: probably from a Gaelic personal name cognate with Welsh Morcant.

variants.name: Merrigan
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Muireagáin ‘descendant of Muireagán’ a personal name derived from muir ‘sea’. Compare Morgan , with which this name has been confused.

variants.name: Morgans
meanings: Welsh (especially Glamorgan): variant of Morgan , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Bleddyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: from an ancient byname from blaidd ‘wolf’ + the diminutive suffix -yn. Blaidd was often used in medieval Welsh as a term for a hero.

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of any of the names beginning with this syllable.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

variants.name: Alan
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

variants.name: Albert
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

en.lifeSummary: Lord of Beachly and Llanllowel Bleddyn Broadspear ap Morgan was born in 1140, in Usk, Monmouthshire, Wales as the son of Morgan ab Owain. He had at least 1 daughter. He died in 1256, in Wales, at the age of 116.

fr.lifeSummary: Lord of Beachly and Llanllowel Bleddyn Broadspear ap Morgan est né en 1140, à Usk, Monmouthshire, Galles, fils de Morgan ab Owain. Il a eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1256, à Galles, à l’âge de 116 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Lord of Beachly and Llanllowel Bleddyn Broadspear ap Morgan wurde 1140 in Usk, Monmouthshire, Wales, als Sohn von Morgan ab Owain geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1256 im Alter von 116 Jahren in Wales.

it.lifeSummary: Lord of Beachly and Llanllowel Bleddyn Broadspear ap Morgan è nato il nel 1140 nel Usk, Monmouthshire, Galles come figlio di Morgan ab Owain. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1256, nel Galles, all'età di 116 anni.

ja.Usk, Monmouthshire, Wales: ウェールズモンモウスシュアイアウスク
ja.lifeSummary: Lord of Beachly and Llanllowel Bleddyn Broadspear ap Morganは1140年にウェールズモンモウスシュアイアウスクでMorgan ab Owainの息子として生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1256年にウェールズで116歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lord of Beachly and Llanllowel Bleddyn Broadspear ap Morgan(은)는 1140년 웨일스 몬모우스실르 스크에서 Morgan ab Owain의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1256년 웨일스에서 116세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Lord of Beachly and Llanllowel Bleddyn Broadspear ap Morgan nasceu em 1140, em Usk, Monmouthshire, Gales filho de Morgan ab Owain. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1256, em Gales, com 116 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Lord of Beachly and Llanllowel Bleddyn Broadspear ap Morgan родился в 1140 г. в местности уск, монмоутшир, Уэльс. Его отца звали Morgan ab Owain. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1256 г. в местности Уэльс в возрасте 116 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Lord of Beachly and Llanllowel Bleddyn Broadspear ap Morgan nació en 1140, en Usk, Monmouthshire, Gales como hijo de Morgan ab Owain. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1256, en Gales, a la edad de 116 años.
